scripts.dev: bun run db:generate && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "FASTAPI_BRAIN_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 bun run --cwd node-gateway dev" "cd fastapi-brain && NODE_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.test: bun run --cwd node-gateway test && cd fastapi-brain && NODE_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 uv run pytest
scripts.db:generate: bunx prisma generate --generator client && cd fastapi-brain && uv run prisma py generate --schema ../prisma/schema.prisma --generator python
